title: SIGSEGV insert_string_bat (b=0x7fffe419d0a0, n=0x7fffc4006010, append=0) at gdk_batop.c:196
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, name TEXT, age INTEGER, address TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age, address) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age, address) VALUES (2, NULL, 25, '123 Main St');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE name IS NULL AND address IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NULL OR address IS NULL LIMIT 5;
key_bug_features: NULL value handling in string columns during selection
